metadata.purpose: Measured scan/non-scan recommendations for bundled fixed-boundary examples. These records drive the fast-first selector without inspecting input physics or size.

overrides.note: Focused profile: scan cold 3.08 s vs non-scan cold 1.11 s with matching convergence; warm runtime is much faster with scan once the runner is cached.

Focused high-mode profile with three requested iterations: explicit accelerated scan wall time 3.62 s versus explicit accelerated loop 1.78 s, with the scan path cold-compile dominated. Keep the fast accelerated policy but use the non-scan loop for this bundled regression fixture.
